$comment: Registry of skills vendored from external repos. The sync-vendored-skills workflow keeps these in sync. Add entries via the import-skill skill. Each entry: name (skill folder under skills/), repo (owner/name on GitHub), ref (branch/tag/sha), upstream_dir (path to the skill root within the upstream repo; '.' if SKILL.md is at the repo root), paths (files to sync, relative to both upstream_dir and skills/<name>/).
